title: Add wc_AesKeyWrap and wc_AesKeyUnWrap bindings to wolfcrypt-rs
description: Add two bindings to the extern block in wolfcrypt-rs/src/lib.rs, gated under #[cfg(wolfssl_aes_keywrap)] if appropriate (or ungated if the symbol is always present). Signatures from wolfssl/wolfcrypt/aes.h: int wc_AesKeyWrap(const byte* key, word32 keySz, const byte* in, word32 inSz, byte* out, word32 outSz, const byte* iv); int wc_AesKeyUnWrap(const byte* key, word32 keySz, const byte* in, word32 inSz, byte* out, word32 outSz, const byte* iv). In Rust: pub fn wc_AesKeyWrap(key: *const u8, keySz: u32, in_: *const u8, inSz: u32, out: *mut u8, outSz: u32, iv: *const u8) -> c_int. Place near the existing AES key wrap section (around line 1442). Run cargo build -p wolfcrypt-rs to confirm symbols link.
